lastAction: Materialized the independent reviewer's complete final Slice 2B15 design review at docs/implementation/phase-3-slice-2b15-design-review.md. Verdict RULE_DESIGN_PASS covers exact main@bf6c0ecbb8ad8ddba244d69ccb53ec4b26b557ea and v3 SHA-256 a0de120b266e26a8d7fcea293b7cb5dbf24c8a4ea5e80cad7cfc121cb1adaa52; all six round-1 and three round-2 blockers are closed. Implementation remains unstarted and awaits controller verification and explicit authorization; any future implementation is limited to the reviewed first-night base/Philosopher pipeline, slice-local tenure reducer, existing-event adapter, atomic chain, and historical private projection.
